banner.orderNotFound: We couldn't find a matching order — it may have expired or been cancelled.
banner.paidBody: Your order has been processed and your subscription details are updated.
banner.alreadySettledBody: This order was already paid earlier, so there is no new charge.
banner.errorBody: The payment couldn't be completed. Please try again later or create a new order.
banner.closedBody: If you've already paid, the system will confirm the payment and update this page automatically. If not, you can start the payment again.
banner.pendingBody: Card payments usually confirm within seconds; WeChat Pay can take up to about 10 minutes. This page refreshes automatically once confirmed — no need to pay again.
banner.paidConfirmedBody: The payment is confirmed; your subscription and benefits will refresh automatically.
banner.failedBody: The order couldn't be paid. Please start the payment again or try later.
banner.incompleteBody: This order hasn't been paid yet. To upgrade, you can create a new order.
banner.refundedBody: The refund status has been synced to your billing records.
banner.stillConfirmingBody: Confirmation is taking longer than expected (cards usually take seconds; WeChat up to about 10 minutes). This page updates automatically once confirmed, and you can refresh later to check. If you haven't paid, the order expires automatically after 30 minutes.

checkout.noPlans: No plans are available to purchase right now.
checkout.title: Choose a plan
checkout.subtitle: Your account benefits upgrade immediately after payment.
checkout.planCovered: Your current plan already covers this tier
checkout.footnote: Payment channels and prices are configured server-side; trial and refund rules will follow in a later notice. This payment only creates an order for the selected plan and does not auto-renew.
checkout.errorNoCheckoutUrl: No payment link received. Please try again later.
checkout.paidToast: Payment successful — your subscription is updated

credits.previewNotice: Credit data is a preview; billing is still based on your plan quota.
credits.expiresInDays: {days, plural, one {Expires in # day} other {Expires in # days}}

history.emptyBody: After your first payment, your invoices will appear here.
history.title: Billing history
history.subtitle: Shows your payment records, newest first.
history.loadFailedInline: Billing history is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

subscription.title: Current subscription
subscription.noneBody: You don't have a paid subscription yet. Your account is currently running on the
subscription.subtitle: The details below reflect actual server records and imply no auto-renewal.

wechat.title: WeChat QR payment
wechat.failedBody: This order wasn't paid. After closing this window you can start the payment again.
wechat.screenshotHint: On mobile, send the screenshot to a desktop to scan and pay, or scan it with another phone.
wechat.pollExhausted: Confirmation timed out. If you've already paid, you can close this window — the billing page will update automatically once the payment arrives.
wechat.waiting: Waiting for payment confirmation… this window updates automatically once you've paid
wechat.scanHint: Open WeChat on your phone and use Scan to scan the QR code above and complete the payment. The QR code can't be recognized by long-press.
